testcase.name: test_sync_contacts_when_connected

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 400 assert 400 in [200, 429] + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_alegra_integration.py:177: in test_sync_contacts_when_connected assert response.status_code in [200, 429], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 400 E assert 400 in [200, 429] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_disconnect_and_reconnect

testcase.name: test_full_connection_flow

failure.message: assert False == True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbffffaceb80>('success') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbffffaceb80> = {'message': 'Error de conexión: Alegra API error: {"code":429,"message":"Too many requests","headers":{"x-rate-limit-limit":250,"x-rate-limit-remaining":239,"x-rate-limit-reset":15}}', 'success': False}.get + where {'message': 'Error de conexión: Alegra API error: {"code":429,"message":"Too many requests","headers":{"x-rate-limit-limit":250,"x-rate-limit-remaining":239,"x-rate-limit-reset":15}}', 'success': False} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json
